strengths: 15+ years of diverse software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure systems, demonstrating broad technical depth
Direct involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP (Model Context Protocol) and agentic workflows at re:cinq
Entrepreneurial experience with GISCollective, an open-source Geo-Data platform, showing innovation and product-building capability
concerns: Limited explicit mention of AI/ML expertise or recognized expertise in AI (e.g., publications, patents, or widely adopted AI products) beyond agentic workflows
No formal advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in an AI-related field, though compensating with extensive practical experience
Current role (re:cinq) is recent (April 2025–present), leaving limited visibility into long-term impact or leadership in AI strategy

key_factors.factor: formal AI education or recognized expertise

response.justification: Bogdan exhibits strong technical versatility and deep software engineering expertise, with recent AI-agent infrastructure experience, but his suitability is tempered by a lack of explicit AI strategy leadership, recognized AI expertise, or advanced AI-related degrees. His entrepreneurial and open-source contributions are notable, but the role requires demonstrated strategic AI impact, which is not fully evidenced.
